stemHtml: During take-off, what are the consequences of mistakenly using a dry V1 on a wet runway. The actual accelerate stop distance required...

options.a: remains the same, because V<sub>1</sub> does not change.
options.b: will be longer, because of reduced braking capability.
options.c: remains the same, because V<sub>1</sub> covers the risk of using dry speeds on wet runways.
options.d: will be shorter, since a dry V<sub>1</sub> is more conservative.
